item.title: Challenges And Opportunities In Machine Learning For Metal Additive Manufacturing: Data Scarcity And Interpretability
item.description:
Publication date: August 2026

Source: Materials Today, Volume 97

Author(s): Kai Guo, Songzhe Xu, Chang Sun, Wentao Yan, Jinhui Yan, Hao Yu, Chenchong Wang, Wei Xu, Jinguo Li, Zhongnan Bi, Tao Hu, Ruixin Zhao, Jiang Wang, Chaoyue Chen, Zhongming Ren
